flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Clayton  State University fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (5.2k → 4.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Clayton  State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Clayton  State University rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 (14.2% → 18.0%).
